creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146754
port update patch

Small bugfix release:

03/07/2012 Yvan Fournier <yvan.fournier@edf.fr>

        * Improve detection and handling of SCOTCH or METIS partitioners
        so as to better handle versions built with shared libraries.

03/07/2012 Yvan Fournier <yvan.fournier@edf.fr>

        * Improve robustness of partitioning by cleaning graph provided
        to the libSCOTCH partitioning library.

04/04/2012 Yvan Fournier <yvan.fournier@edf.fr>

        * Allow reading of CGNS files with BC's referring non-existant
        edges, as a workaround for a bug in ICEM CFD 13 CGNS export.
